title: Terracotta Collection
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f30640de023144dfdbeb3010f6dfb5768a92ce03.png)

This Mod adds many new varients for every Terracotta color, 
included are:
2x Chiseled 
2x Pillars
3x Brick varients + Walls + Stairs + Slabs
1x Polished + Walls + Stairs + Slabs
17 Different Terracotta Colors

Extra Bonus:
Each Vanilla Terracotta Color has:
1x Wall
1x Stairs
1x Slabs

Enhance or Indulge into the beauty of building with terracotta,
Wheter you are building ancient Ruins, Pyramids, ancient altars 
Terracotta Collection enhances your block pallette with ALOT of new blocks!


***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.  

[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1256117/description_64c320a5-8d4b-4911-97d9-ae44570af17c.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Azturax)
